# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-a
        image: service-a:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-b
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-b
        image: service-b:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-c
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-c
        image: service-c:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
